method: Simulation-inferred residual-stress estimate from measured membrane profiles reported in the source paper.
operating_conditions: Reported approximately 1.5 um thermally grown SiO2 square membrane with approximately 506.7 um side length after release from a silicon frame.
review_notes: Simulation-inferred literature stress estimate, not a direct independent stress measurement and not an independently reproduced Diamond Thermal Lab result.

uncertainty.basis: The source reports a method-level relative error below approximately 5 percent. No sample-specific numeric uncertainty is transcribed here; the estimate is simulation-inferred from measured profiles.
